title: cacalia virgulata
intro: Cacalia virgulata, also known as Cacalia, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the sunflower family (Asteraceae) and is native to North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Cacalia virgulata include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. Cacalia virgulata can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
